title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE MAGALLANES NATIONAL VOCATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL 芒聙聯 CAGBOLO ANNEX IN BARANGAY CAGBOLO, MUNICIPALITY OF MAGALLANES, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON FROM THE MAGALLANES NATIONAL VOCATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL VOCATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS CAGBOLO NATIONAL VOCATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
109 OG No. 4, 399 (January 28, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10261, November 15, 2012 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE MAGALLANES NATIONAL VOCATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL 芒聙聯 CAGBOLO ANNEX IN BARANGAY CAGBOLO, MUNICIPALITY OF MAGALLANES, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON FROM THE MAGALLANES NATIONAL VOCATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL VOCATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS CAGBOLO NATIONAL VOCATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a National Vocational High School.

芒聙聯

The Magallanes National Vocational High School 芒聙聯 Cagbolo Annex in

Barangay Cagbolo, Municipality of Magallanes, Province of Sorsogon is

hereby separated from the Magallanes National Vocational High School and

converted into an independent national vocational high school to be

known as Cagbolo National Vocational High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

芒聙聯 All

personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Magallanes National

Vocational High School 芒聙聯 Cagbolo Annex are hereby transferred to and

absorbed by the Cagbolo National Vocational High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

芒聙聯 The Secretary of Education

shall immediately include in the Department芒聙聶s program the

operationalization of the Cagbolo National Vocational High School, the

initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year芒聙聶s

appropriations of the Magallanes National Vocational High School 芒聙聯

Cagbolo Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued

operation of the school shall be included in the annual General

Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

芒聙聯 The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations that may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity. 芒聙聯

This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was

finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on August

3, 2011 and July 24, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

NOV 15 2012

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
